home.subtitle: Sign transactions and share keys. Nothing leaves this device unless you approve it.
receive.title: Receive Decred
sign.chooseSourceHint: Scan the QR from your wallet, or load it from an SD card.
sign.reviewHint: Check the amount and recipients. Approving unlocks your seed to sign.
sign.signedQrHint: Scan this with your wallet to broadcast.
export.title: Watch-only key
export.hint: Import this into your wallet to track balances and build transactions. It cannot move funds.
seed.title: Your recovery seed
seed.hint: Write these words down and keep them safe. Anyone with them controls your funds. Tap the icon to show a SeedQR instead.
